steps.title: Interpret the equation
steps.content: The equation $$5x+24y=4529$$ shows total trees equals (5 hectares)*(x trees/hectare) plus (24 hectares)*(y trees/hectare). Therefore, $x$ represents the average number of trees per hectare in the industrial park.

steps.title: Identify the meaning of x
steps.content: From the interpretation, $x$ is the average trees per hectare in the industrial park, which corresponds to choice A. That matches choice A — A is correct.
